text: The Shawshank Redemption, directed by Frank Darabont, was filmed at the Ohio State Reformatory in Mansfield.
Le groupe Daft Punk a annonce sa separation apres 28 ans de carriere, laissant des fans du monde entier en deuil.
Researchers at Johns Hopkins University published new findings on the efficacy of remdesivir in treating COVID-19 patients in The Lancet.
Die Berliner Philharmoniker spielten Beethovens Neunte Symphonie in der Elbphilharmonie in Hamburg.
Sony announced the PlayStation 5 Pro at a press event in Tokyo, featuring an upgraded AMD GPU and enhanced ray tracing capabilities.
El FC Barcelona ficho a Lamine Yamal, considerado el nuevo Messi, del programa de cantera La Masia.
The 2024 Nobel Prize in Medicine was awarded to Victor Ambros and Gary Ruvkun for discovering microRNA and its role in post-transcriptional gene regulation.
Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra utilizes a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor and was unveiled at the Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas.
Studio Ghibli no shin-saku 'Kimitachi wa Do Ikiru ka' ga Miyazaki Hayao kantoku ni yotte seisaku saremashita.
Doctors Without Borders reported an outbreak of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, with the WHO coordinating a response using the rVSV-ZEBOV vaccine.
